changes.summary: Nest webhook controller at POST /api/telegram/hooks/:botUsername delegating to TgBotsService.processHookBody (BC-19 OD-4).
TelegramInfrastructureModule composition root: registers webhook controller and TgBotsService with DomainModule + CommonServicesModule.
Barrel exports TelegramInfrastructureModule, TelegramWebhookController, TgBotsService; TgBotsModule alias for meriter.module.

BC-19 domain service: inbound hashtag-gated publications route through PublicationService.createPublication with checkPermissions and processPostCost (CreatePublicationUseCase / V-09). Fixed unused tgChatIdInt lint (prefix _).
Integration tests: publicationAdd, processHookBody ignore non-hashtag, webhook controller end-to-end (3/3 pass).

write_set_compliance: strict — only infrastructure/telegram/ and domain/services/tg-bots.service.ts edited in attempt 3
notes: Attempt 3 fixes write-set lint (unused tgChatIdInt). Prior attempt-02 lint delta (43 issues in auth/communities use cases) is outside write_set and unchanged.
